lines.text: [unclear] was first attracted while driving north along Ritchie
[REDACTED] in company with [REDACTED] a friend, a
[unclear] object was observed just ahead of the automobile. It was
approximately 10:45 P.M. The engine in the car seemed to die and car drifted
to a stop, the driver pulling slightly off the road. The object was
approximately over the car and had no forward motion. It seemed to be tilted
slightly and was giving off a yellowish-greenish light which faded and then
came on again and then faded again. The outer edges of this object which seemed
to be round with a thickness toward the center, seemed to be opaque. Mr. Tyler
stated he was not sure whether he had observed anything that looked like a port-hole. He stated he was not
sure of the exact location, but there might
